name: HMCS Wasaga (J 162)
events: 31 Oct 1941 HMS Indomitable (Capt. H.E. Morse, DSO, RN) conducted flying exercises off Bermuda. She was escorted by HMCS Wasaga (T/Lt.Cdr. W. Redford, RCNR) and HMCS Cowichan (T/Lt. J.R. Kidston, RCNVR). (1)
4 Feb 1945 HMCS Wasaga (T/Lt. J.J.H. Green, RCNR) ended a refit.
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
